description: This Java class configures notification providers (email and SMS) and the notification service in a Spring Boot application. It includes logic to select appropriate provider implementations based on application properties, defaulting to stub providers if credentials are missing.

classes.name: NotificationConfig
classes.description: Spring configuration class for setting up notification providers and service with conditional logic based on application properties.

methods.name: emailProvider
methods.description: Creates and returns an EmailProvider implementation based on configuration properties, defaulting to stub or real providers as credentials are detected.

methods.name: notBlank
methods.description: Utility method to check if a string is not null and not blank.

methods.name: smsProvider
methods.description: Creates and returns an SmsProvider implementation based on configuration properties, defaulting to stub or Twilio provider.

methods.name: notificationService
methods.description: Creates a NotificationService instance with configured email and SMS providers.
